rulings.Case Title: KELLY A. ARCHER et al VS. MAURICE OHAYON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 16 , 2012 Line 4 - PLAINTIFF KELLY ARCHER's Motion To Quash Writ. Denied - no bases to quash writ issued per valid Judgment.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY A. ARCHER et al VS. MAURICE OHAYON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition Fo Requitable Relief From Forefeiture Of Lease
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 16 , 2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANTs MAURICE OHAYON and MICHAEL OHAYON's Verified Petition Fo Requitable Relief From Forefeiture Of Lease. Denied - See Simons 93 Cal Appeal 3l 170; Relief does not apply to failure to exercise on option.=(501/REQ)
